source.sqlReaderQuery:
-- DISPOSITION 


WITH A AS 
(
	SELECT DIVISION,DISPOSITION
	FROM 
	(
		SELECT 
		IN_1.DIVISION,
		IN_1.DISPOSITION
		FROM 
			(
			SELECT DISTINCT DIVISION,
			DISPOSITION
			
			FROM [ZML].[FACT_FIVE9_CALL_LOG_ALL]
			WHERE DIVISION IN ('FHI','MAC','MXH','PBC','RTW','SWR','CTA','HSI')
			AND DISPOSITION IS NOT NULL
			
			UNION 
			
			SELECT DISTINCT DIVISION,
			LP_DISPOSITION AS DISPOSITION
			FROM [ZML].[FACT_FIVE9_CALL_LOG_ALL]
			WHERE DIVISION IN ('FHI','MAC','MXH','PBC','RTW','SWR','CTA','HSI')
			AND DISPOSITION IS NULL AND LP_DISPOSITION IS NOT NULL
			
			
			) IN_1
			LEFT JOIN [ZML].[DIM_FIVE9_CALL_RESULT_DISPOSITION]  IN_2
			ON IN_1.DISPOSITION = IN_2.CallResult
			AND IN_1.DIVISION = IN_2.DIVISION
		WHERE IN_2.CallResultID IS NULL
			
		) A1 	
	),

B AS 
( 
	SELECT 
	A.DIVISION,
	A.DISPOSITION,
	B1.RW
	FROM A 
	LEFT JOIN 
	(
		SELECT
			COALESCE(DISPOSITION,'NA1') AS DISPOSITION,
			ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY DISPOSITION) AS RW
			FROM 
			(SELECT DISTINCT DISPOSITION FROM A ) A1
			
			) B1
	
	ON A.DISPOSITION = B1.DISPOSITION
			
	),
	
 C AS 
( 
	SELECT COALESCE(MAX(CallResultID_KEY),0) AS CallResultID_KEY FROM 
	(
		SELECT 
		CAST(RIGHT(CallResultID, LEN(CallResultID) - CHARINDEX('-', CallResultID)) AS INT) AS CallResultID_KEY 
		FROM [ZML].[DIM_FIVE9_CALL_RESULT_DISPOSITION]
		) C1
		)



SELECT 
CONCAT(CONCAT(DIVISION,'-'),(B.RW + C.CallResultID_KEY)) AS  CallResultID,
B.DIVISION,
B.DISPOSITION AS CallResult,
CAST(GETDATE() AS DATE) AS LASTUPDATEDTS 

FROM B LEFT JOIN C ON 1=1;

-- PRODUCT 

WITH A AS 
(

SELECT M1.DIVISION,M1.PRODUCT
FROM 
(
	SELECT DISTINCT DIVISION,
	PRODUCT AS PRODUCT
	FROM [ZML].[FACT_FIVE9_CALL_LOG_ALL]
	WHERE DIVISION IN ('FHI','PHI','MAC','MXH','PBC','RTW','SWR','CTA','HSI') 
	AND PRODUCT IS NOT NULL
	
	UNION 
	
	SELECT DISTINCT DIVISION,
	LP_PRODUCT AS PRODUCT
	FROM [ZML].[FACT_FIVE9_CALL_LOG_ALL]
	WHERE DIVISION IN ('FHI','PHI','MAC','MXH','PBC','RTW','SWR','CTA','HSI') 
	AND PRODUCT IS NULL AND LP_PRODUCT IS NOT NULL
	
	) M1

LEFT JOIN [ZML].[DIM_FIVE9_PRODUCT] P 
ON  M1.DIVISION = P.DIVISION
AND M1.PRODUCT  = P.PRODUCTNAME

WHERE P.PRODUCTID IS NULL

)
,
B AS 
( 
	SELECT 
	A.DIVISION,
	A.PRODUCT,
	B1.RW 
	FROM A LEFT JOIN
	(

		SELECT
			COALESCE(PRODUCT,'NA1') AS PRODUCT,
			ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY PRODUCT) AS RW
			FROM 
			(SELECT DISTINCT PRODUCT FROM A) A1
			
			) B1
	ON A.PRODUCT = B1.PRODUCT
		),
 
 C AS 
( 
	SELECT COALESCE(MAX(ProductID_KEY),0) AS ProductID_KEY FROM 
	(
		SELECT 
		CAST(RIGHT(PRODUCTID, LEN(PRODUCTID) - CHARINDEX('-', PRODUCTID)) AS INT) AS ProductID_KEY 
		FROM [ZML].[DIM_FIVE9_PRODUCT]
		) C1
		)
		
SELECT 
CONCAT(CONCAT(DIVISION,'-'),(B.RW + C.ProductID_KEY)) AS PRODUCTID,
B.DIVISION,
B.PRODUCT,
CAST(GETDATE() AS DATE) AS LASTUPDATEDTS 

FROM B LEFT JOIN C ON 1=1;

-- Market

WITH A AS 
(
	SELECT 
	IN_1.DIVISION,
	IN_1.MARKET
	FROM 
		(
			SELECT DISTINCT A.Division,A.Market
			FROM [ZML].[FACT_FIVE9_CALL_LOG_ALL] A 
			JOIN ZML.DIM_BRANCH B
			ON A.Market = B.LP_BranchID
			AND A.Division = B.Division
			WHERE A.DIVISION IN ('FHI', 'PHI', 'MAC', 'MXH', 'PBC', 'RTW', 'SWR', 'CTA', 'HSI')
			
			UNION 
			
			SELECT DISTINCT A.Division,A.LP_BranchID AS Market
			FROM [ZML].[FACT_FIVE9_CALL_LOG_ALL] A 
			JOIN ZML.DIM_BRANCH B
			ON A.LP_BranchID = B.LP_BranchID
			AND A.Division = B.Division
			WHERE A.DIVISION IN ('FHI', 'PHI', 'MAC', 'MXH', 'PBC', 'RTW', 'SWR', 'CTA', 'HSI')
			
			) IN_1
			
		LEFT JOIN ZML.DIM_FIVE9_MARKET IN_2
		ON IN_1.DIVISION = IN_2.DIVISION
		AND IN_1.MARKET = IN_2.MARKET 
	WHERE IN_2.MARKETID IS NULL
	
),

B AS 
( 
	SELECT 
	A.DIVISION,
	A.MARKET,
	B1.RW
	FROM A 
	LEFT JOIN 
	(
		SELECT
			COALESCE(MARKET,'NA1') AS MARKET,
			ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY MARKET) AS RW
			FROM 
			(SELECT DISTINCT MARKET FROM A ) A1
			
			) B1
	
	ON A.MARKET = B1.MARKET
			
	),
	
 C AS 
( 
	SELECT COALESCE(MAX(MARKETID_KEY),0) AS MARKETID_KEY FROM 
	(
		SELECT 
		CAST(RIGHT(MARKETID, LEN(MARKETID) - CHARINDEX('-', MARKETID)) AS INT) AS MARKETID_KEY 
		FROM ZML.DIM_FIVE9_MARKET
		) C1
		)



SELECT 
CONCAT(CONCAT(B.DIVISION,'-'),(B.RW + C.MARKETID_KEY)) AS  MARKETID,
B.DIVISION,
B.MARKET,
CAST(GETDATE() AS DATE) AS LASTUPDATEDTS 

FROM B LEFT JOIN C ON 1=1;

-- LeadSubSOurce 


WITH A AS 
(	
	SELECT
	IN_1.DIVISION,
	IN_1.SOURCEGROUP,
	IN_1.SOURCE,
	IN_1.SUBSOURCE 
	FROM 
		(

		SELECT DISTINCT DIVISION,
		SOURCEGROUP,
		SOURCE,
		SUBSOURCE
		FROM
		(
			SELECT DISTINCT DIVISION,
				COALESCE(SOURCEGROUP,LP_SOURCEGROUP) 	AS SOURCEGROUP,
				COALESCE(SOURCE,LP_SOURCECODE) 			AS SOURCE,
				COALESCE(SUBSOURCE,LP_LeadSUBSOURCE)	AS SUBSOURCE
				FROM [ZML].[FACT_FIVE9_CALL_LOG_ALL]
			WHERE DIVISION IN ('FHI','PHI','MAC','MXH','PBC','RTW','SWR','CTA','HSI')	
			) M1
			WHERE  NOT (
    					SOURCEGROUP IS NULL AND
  					  	SOURCE IS NULL AND
    					SUBSOURCE IS NULL
						)
			
			) IN_1
		
		LEFT JOIN [ZML].[DIM_FIVE9_SUB_SOURCE_MAPPING] IN_2
		ON  IN_1.DIVISION 						= IN_2.DIVISION 
        AND COALESCE(IN_1.SOURCEGROUP,'NA') 	= COALESCE(IN_2.SOURCEGROUP,'NA')
        AND COALESCE(IN_1.SOURCE,'NA') 			= COALESCE(IN_2.SOURCE,'NA')
        AND COALESCE(IN_1.SUBSOURCE,'NA') 		= COALESCE(IN_2.SUBSOURCE,'NA') 
		
		WHERE IN_2.LEADSUBSOURCEID IS NULL
		
),

B AS 
( 
	SELECT 
	A.DIVISION,
	A.SOURCEGROUP,
	A.SOURCE,
	A.SUBSOURCE,
	B1.RW
	FROM A 
	LEFT JOIN 
	(
		SELECT
			SOURCEGROUP,
			SOURCE,
			SUBSOURCE,
			ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY SOURCEGROUP,SOURCE,SUBSOURCE) AS RW
			FROM 
			(SELECT DISTINCT SOURCEGROUP,SOURCE,SUBSOURCE FROM A ) A1
			
			) B1
	
	ON 	COALESCE(A.SOURCEGROUP,'NA') 	= COALESCE(B1.SOURCEGROUP,'NA')
	AND COALESCE(A.SOURCE,'NA') 		= COALESCE(B1.SOURCE,'NA')
	AND COALESCE(A.SUBSOURCE,'NA') 		= COALESCE(B1.SUBSOURCE,'NA')
			
	),

	
 C AS 
( 
	SELECT COALESCE(MAX(LEADSUBSOURCEID_KEY),0) AS LEADSUBSOURCEID_KEY FROM 
	(
		SELECT 
		CAST(RIGHT(LEADSUBSOURCEID, LEN(LEADSUBSOURCEID) - CHARINDEX('-', LEADSUBSOURCEID)) AS INT) AS LEADSUBSOURCEID_KEY 
		FROM [ZML].[DIM_FIVE9_SUB_SOURCE_MAPPING]
		) C1
		)
		


		
SELECT 
CONCAT(CONCAT(B.DIVISION,'-'),(B.RW + C.LEADSUBSOURCEID_KEY)) AS  LEADSUBSOURCEID,
B.DIVISION,
B.SOURCEGROUP,
B.SOURCE,
B.SUBSOURCE,
CAST(GETDATE() AS DATE) AS LASTUPDATEDTS 

FROM B LEFT JOIN C ON 1=1;

UPDATE EDW.DIM_FIVE9_CALL_RESULT_DISPOSITION
SET AnsweredCall=0,
VoiceMail=0;


--****** ANSWERED CALLS ********

UPDATE EDW.DIM_FIVE9_CALL_RESULT_DISPOSITION
SET AnsweredCall=1
WHERE CallResult IN

--****** VOICEMAIL ********

SET VoiceMail=1
WHERE CallResult IN
